violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Remove carpet from can storage rack.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean rack by dishwasher.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room used by women did not contain at least one covered waste receptacle. -1 room did not have a covered waste basket.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floors under dishwash area. and under equipment more thoroughly.
